column8: Where__________(you/go) when I saw you on the bus last night?
column10: When we shared a room, Zoe___________(always/take) my things. It was so annoying!
column11: When I went to get the tickets, I realised I__________(not/have) any money.
column12: When I was young, we__________(go) to France every year on holiday.
column13: Elvis___________(become) famous for the song Blue Suede Shoes.
column14: When you rang last night I_____________(work) in the garden so I didn't hear the phone.
column15: I_______________(hear) from Davina last night. She says hello.
column16: The old man_____________(appear) to be very tired and he slowly sat down.
column17: We_____________(throw) a surprise party from my brother last Saturday.
